title: Ralestone Luck
author: Andre Norton
description: "Ralestone Luck" is a juvenile adventure novel about kids who inherit a haunted old mansion in the Deep South of the USA. The protagonists live through numerous adventures in the nearby swamps, meet a mysterious boy hanging about, have to face claims from another possible heir to the house backed up by local thugs, find underground tunnels and a lost treasure, and, perhaps, have the best time of their lives, which is s interesting to follow as a reader.
